name: Phylactery Heart
description: Your spare life. Place in any room — die in a fight and you respawn while the heart lives. Adventurers can hunt and destroy it.

name: Door Lock
description: Locks a doorway — passable only with a key (or Rogue pick / Barbarian break). Requires a reachable Key Chest.

name: Key Chest
description: Holds the key to a specific locked door. Refills at the start of every day.

name: Soul-Bound Beacon
description: Empowers minions in its room (+30% damage & HP, scales with boss level). Requires a Healing Fountain elsewhere as the trade-off.

name: Healing Fountain
description: Heals any adventurer who touches it to full + a 15s regen blessing (even vs the boss). Re-usable. Required by the Soul-Bound Beacon.

name: Treasure Chest T1
description: Tier 1 chest. Pays 10g per day. If looted, the adventurer steals 10% of your gold and may flee with it (10% tempt chance).

name: Treasure Chest T2
description: Tier 2 chest. Pays 20g per day. If looted, the adventurer steals 17% of your gold and may flee with it (14% tempt chance).

name: Treasure Chest T3
description: Tier 3 chest. Pays 35g per day. If looted, the adventurer steals 24% of your gold and may flee with it (19% tempt chance).

name: Treasure Chest T4
description: Tier 4 chest. Pays 55g per day. If looted, the adventurer steals 31% of your gold and may flee with it (23% tempt chance).

name: Treasure Chest T5
description: Tier 5 chest. Pays 80g per day. If looted, the adventurer steals 38% of your gold and may flee with it (28% tempt chance).

name: Treasure Chest T6
description: Tier 6 chest. Pays 110g per day. If looted, the adventurer steals 45% of your gold and may flee with it (32% tempt chance).

name: Treasure Chest T7
description: Tier 7 chest. Pays 145g per day. If looted, the adventurer steals 52% of your gold and may flee with it (37% tempt chance).

name: Treasure Chest T8
description: Tier 8 chest. Pays 185g per day. If looted, the adventurer steals 59% of your gold and may flee with it (41% tempt chance).

name: Treasure Chest T9
description: Tier 9 chest. Pays 230g per day. If looted, the adventurer steals 66% of your gold and may flee with it (46% tempt chance).

name: Treasure Chest T10
description: Tier 10 chest. Pays 300g per day. If looted, the adventurer steals 75% of your gold and may flee with it (50% tempt chance).
